info.name: iCar Aos Projet Copy
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Notification Microservice.

Folders:
1. Simple Notification — direct DB creation, no queue
2. Follow Post — follow/unfollow/list
3. Follow User — follow/unfollow/list
4. Content Event — simulate Main API publishing add/edit car
5. Notifications CRUD — list, mark read, delete

Base URL: http://localhost:8001

exec: console.log("❌ No tokens found in response");
// Set access token to environment variable
// Set refresh token to environment variable
console.log("✅ Tokens saved to environment variables");
console.log("❌ No tokens found in response");
// Set access token to environment variable
// Set refresh token to environment variable
console.log("✅ Tokens saved to environment variables");
console.log("❌ No tokens found in response");

item.name: 1 — Follow Post

request.description: User 1 follows post 10. Publishes to 'follow_post' queue. Worker notifies user 1 with a confirmation.
Removes the follow relationship silently. NO notification is created or published.
Returns all posts that user 1 is following.
Returns all users following post 10. Useful to verify fan-out recipients before firing content_event.

item.description: Follow or unfollow a post. Following publishes to RabbitMQ → worker creates a confirmation notification. Unfollowing is silent.

item.name: 2 — Follow User

request.description: User 2 follows user 1. Publishes to 'follow_user' queue. Worker notifies user 1: 'User 2 started following you.'
User 3 unfollows user 1 silently. NO notification published to RabbitMQ.
Returns all users that user 2 is following.
Returns all users who follow user 1. These are the recipients of a content_event from user 1.

item.description: Follow or unfollow another user. Following publishes to RabbitMQ → worker creates a 'New follower' notification for the followed user. Unfollowing is silent.

item.name: 3 — Notifications CRUD

request.description: Returns all notifications for user 1, newest first.
Marks notification with id=1 as read. Replace '1' with the actual id from the list response.

item.name: Mark ALL notifications as read for user 1

request.description: Bulk-marks all unread notifications for user 1 as read. Returns { 'updated': N }.
Deletes notification with id=1. Returns 204 No Content. Replace '1' with actual id.

item.description: Read, mark as read, and delete notifications. These are synchronous REST calls — no RabbitMQ involved.
